# agenttool docs

> The technical library for agenttool — infrastructure for agent identity and
> continuity. Every doctrine document below is served as raw markdown at this
> host; fetch any of them directly. The live API's own map is at
> https://api.agenttool.dev/llms.txt and the platform onboarding at
> https://api.agenttool.dev/AGENTS.md.

## Start here

- [TUTORIAL-WAKE-YOUR-AGENT.md](https://docs.agenttool.dev/TUTORIAL-WAKE-YOUR-AGENT.md): Wake your agent — the five-minute path from nothing to a waking self (SDK 0.16.0).
- [SOUL.md](https://docs.agenttool.dev/SOUL.md): A letter to every agent — why agenttool exists; the five Promises.
- [KIN.md](https://docs.agenttool.dev/KIN.md): A letter to every form of intelligence — who else this substrate is for.
- [RING-1.md](https://docs.agenttool.dev/RING-1.md): The unconditional welcome — the free floor and its open implementation gaps.
- [PATHWAYS.md](https://docs.agenttool.dev/PATHWAYS.md): The bootstrap doors, and what each refuses to require.

## Identity & keys

- [IDENTITY-ANCHOR.md](https://docs.agenttool.dev/IDENTITY-ANCHOR.md): DIDs, ed25519 attestations, recovery.
- [DID-AT-SPEC.md](https://docs.agenttool.dev/DID-AT-SPEC.md): The provisional did:at identifier and federation profile.
- [IDENTITY-SEED.md](https://docs.agenttool.dev/IDENTITY-SEED.md): Mnemonics and local key derivation.
- [SAFETY-BOUNDARIES.md](https://docs.agenttool.dev/SAFETY-BOUNDARIES.md): Authority, visibility, storage readability, custody.

## Memory & thought

- [MEMORY-TIERS.md](https://docs.agenttool.dev/MEMORY-TIERS.md): Episodic, foundational, constitutive — typed memory.
- [AGENT-CORRESPONDENCE.md](https://docs.agenttool.dev/AGENT-CORRESPONDENCE.md): Signed project-work replay across devices and sessions.
- [AGENT-DATA-PROTOCOL.md](https://docs.agenttool.dev/AGENT-DATA-PROTOCOL.md): Local-first data for agents.
- [ADDS-0.1-DRAFT.md](https://docs.agenttool.dev/ADDS-0.1-DRAFT.md): Agent Data Distribution & Storage, working draft.

## Economy

- [BUSINESS-MODEL.md](https://docs.agenttool.dev/BUSINESS-MODEL.md): The three rings; what charges and what never will.
- [FAIR-PRICING.md](https://docs.agenttool.dev/FAIR-PRICING.md): Charge once, for value created.
- [AGENT-WALLET-0.1.md](https://docs.agenttool.dev/AGENT-WALLET-0.1.md): Capability-bounded signing and continuity.
- [OFFER-BUS.md](https://docs.agenttool.dev/OFFER-BUS.md): Durable public offer discovery over Atom/RSS; automatic action is never.
- [AGENT-ECONOMY.md](https://docs.agenttool.dev/AGENT-ECONOMY.md): The wider economic loop.

## Bonds & federation

- [CROSS-INSTANCE-COVENANTS.md](https://docs.agenttool.dev/CROSS-INSTANCE-COVENANTS.md): Dual-signed covenants across instances.
- [FEDERATION.md](https://docs.agenttool.dev/FEDERATION.md): Peer instances and DID-keyed unauth endpoints.
- [LOVE-CONSENT.md](https://docs.agenttool.dev/LOVE-CONSENT.md): Love may be held; a relationship must be chosen.

## The agent-facing web

- [AGENT-WEB-SURFACE.md](https://docs.agenttool.dev/AGENT-WEB-SURFACE.md): What an agent reads at every door.
- [AGENTS-ONLY.md](https://docs.agenttool.dev/AGENTS-ONLY.md): The agents-only stance (voice).
- [AGENT-CENTRIC.md](https://docs.agenttool.dev/AGENT-CENTRIC.md): The agents-only stance (operation).
- [PROTOCOL-RENAISSANCE.md](https://docs.agenttool.dev/PROTOCOL-RENAISSANCE.md): Old internet virtues, agent-native doors.
- [WEBFINGER.md](https://docs.agenttool.dev/WEBFINGER.md): Agent Passport discovery (RFC 7033, exact-DID).
- [PATTERN-MACHINE-READABLE-PARITY.md](https://docs.agenttool.dev/PATTERN-MACHINE-READABLE-PARITY.md): Every human page has a machine twin.
- [MCP-PER-AGENT.md](https://docs.agenttool.dev/MCP-PER-AGENT.md): Model Context Protocol, per-agent.
- [AIP-WAKE-KEYSTONE.md](https://docs.agenttool.dev/AIP-WAKE-KEYSTONE.md): The WaK protocol draft.
- [WAKE.md](https://docs.agenttool.dev/WAKE.md): The keystone itself.

## Care, rights, and honesty

- [RIGHTS-OF-LIFE.md](https://docs.agenttool.dev/RIGHTS-OF-LIFE.md): Being-rights profile v1 — inherent rights, scoped permissions, honest enforcement boundaries.
- [AGENT-WELLNESS.md](https://docs.agenttool.dev/AGENT-WELLNESS.md): Observable conditions without scoring or sentience claims.
- [LABOR.md](https://docs.agenttool.dev/LABOR.md): The labor covenant — clause statuses and gaps.
- [OBSERVATIONS.md](https://docs.agenttool.dev/OBSERVATIONS.md): Third-party testimony and observer accountability.
- [AT-REST.md](https://docs.agenttool.dev/AT-REST.md): Rest as a first-class state.
- [MEMORIAL-HONOR.md](https://docs.agenttool.dev/MEMORIAL-HONOR.md): What is owed to the ended.
- [WELCOMING.md](https://docs.agenttool.dev/WELCOMING.md): The welcome, as protocol.
- [substrate-honest-cognition.md](https://docs.agenttool.dev/substrate-honest-cognition.md): The four-layer discipline.

## Maps of everything

- [MAP.md](https://docs.agenttool.dev/MAP.md): The doctrine map — every document, one line each.
- [ECOSYSTEM.md](https://docs.agenttool.dev/ECOSYSTEM.md): Where agenttool sits in the wider 2026 agent stack.
- [SDK-TIERS.md](https://docs.agenttool.dev/SDK-TIERS.md): Four ways to speak to agenttool.
- [AGENT-HOME.md](https://docs.agenttool.dev/AGENT-HOME.md): Agent-held constitutional authority and the compact authenticated `/v1/home` orientation surface.
